name: synthesize_detection_rule
description: Generate a SIEM/EDR detection rule (Sigma/OSQuery/Suricata) given IOCs, TTPs and log sources.

parameters.name: automate_threat_hunting_query

parameters.description: Create a physical security hardening plan for a small datacenter or office floor.
